en.text: And it shall come to pass at that day
. Loruhamah: that is, Not having obtained mercy no: Heb. not add any more to but: or, that I should altogether pardon them
: for ye are not my people
, and I will not be your God. Loammi: that is, Not my people
; and it shall come to pass, that in the place
unto them, Ye are not my people
unto them, Ye are the sons
. Ammi: that is, My people Ruhamah: that is, Having obtained mercy
: for she is not my wife
And I will not have mercy
. wine: Heb. new wine which: or, wherewith they made Baal
I will also cause all her mirth
unto her. comfortably: or, friendly: Heb. to her heart
And it shall be at that day
. Ishi: that is, My husband Baali: that is, My lord
, and they shall no more be remembered
, and will make them to lie down
And it shall come to pass in that day
her unto me in the earth
upon her that had not obtained mercy
to them which were not my people
; thou shalt not play the harlot
: so will I also be for thee.
: image: Heb. a standing, or, statue, or, pillar
thee, that thou shalt be no priest
to me: seeing thou hast forgotten
against me: therefore will I change
. set: Heb. lift up their soul to
And there shall be, like people
. punish: Heb. visit upon reward: Heb. cause to return
, and they have gone a whoring
. I will not: or, Shall I not fall: or, be punished
ye. sour: Heb. gone rulers: Heb. shields
is toward you, because ye have been a snare
, though I have been a rebuker
of them all. though: or, and a rebuker: Heb. a correction
from me: for now, O Ephraim
of them, and they have not known
. They will: or, Their doings will not suffer them frame: Heb. give
Therefore will I be unto Ephraim
. king Jareb: or, the king of Jareb: or, the king that should plead
For I will be unto Ephraim
, and he will bind us up
. and: or, that thy judgments might be, etc
. by: Heb. with one shoulder, or, to Shechem lewdness: or, enormity
. wickedness: Heb. evils spoileth: Heb. strippeth
. who: or, the raiser will cease raising: or, waking
: there is none among them that calleth
upon them; I will bring them down
unto them! for they have fled
unto them! because they have transgressed
against me: though I have redeemed
, but not to the most High
. He shall come as an eagle
. thy: Heb. the roof of thy
, but not by me: they have made princes
, that they may be cut off
against them: how long will it be ere
it; therefore it is not God
: now shall they be among the Gentiles
. sorrow: or, begin a: or, in a little while
shall be unto him to sin
them not; now will he remember
. They sacrifice: or, In the sacrifices of mine offerings they, etc
: for thou hast gone a whoring
shall be unto them as the bread
. destruction: Heb. spoil the: or, their silver shall be desired, the nettle, etc.: Heb. the desire
. spiritual: Heb. man of the spirit
them, that there shall not be a man
also to them when I depart
. miscarrying: Heb. that casteth the fruit
unto him: and they shall be wanderers
unto himself: according to the multitude
. an: or, a vine emptying the fruit which it giveth images: Heb. statues, or, standing images
; now shall they be found faulty
. Their heart: or, He hath divided their heart break: Heb. behead images: Heb. statues, or, standing images
from it. the priests: or, Chemarim
. the water: Heb. the face of the water
against them, when they shall bind
. when: or, when I shall bind them for their two transgressions, or, in their two habitations
the corn; but I passed over
. her: Heb. the beauty of her neck
. your: Heb. the evil of your evil
: and I was to them as they that take off
unto them. take off: Heb. lift up
them, because of their own counsels
him. none: Heb. together they exalted not
How shall I give thee up
of thee: and I will not enter
: had: Heb. was a prince, or, behaved himself princely
. a merchant: or, Canaan oppress: or, deceive
. in all: or, all my labours suffice me not: he shall have punishment of iniquity in whom is sin that: Heb. which
And I that am the LORD
will yet make thee to dwell
unto him. most: Heb. with bitternesses blood: Heb. bloods
. they sin: Heb. they add to sin the men: or, the sacrificers of men
Therefore they shall be as the morning
that is driven with the whirlwind
Therefore I will be unto them as a lion
of her whelps, and will rend
them. wild: Heb. beast of the field
thyself; but in me is thine help
is any other that may save
? I will: rather, Where is thy king?
upon him: he is an unwise
in the place of the breaking forth
I will be as the dew
. grow: or, blossom cast: Heb. strike
shall be as the olive tree
thereof shall be as the wine
. grow: or, blossom scent: or, memorial
shall say, What have I to do any more with idols
him: I am like a green
